description: §41 — a `use foo:bar` declaration with an unrecognized protocol prefix (`foo:`) fires E-USE-005. Only `scrml:` (stdlib) and `vendor:` (project-local vendor) are legal `use` prefixes.
rationale: §41 (§41 line 21940 + E-USE-005 catalog): a `use` specifier must begin with a recognized prefix. `foo:` is neither `scrml:` nor `vendor:`, so it is rejected E-USE-005.
